top_findings.summary: The skill description explicitly states that it uses Firefox cookies to handle age-restricted or login-required videos. While accessing YouTube content may require authentication, accessing all Firefox cookies exposes sensitive data from other websites (e.g., login sessions, browsing history) that is unrelated to the specific task of extracting insights from YouTube videos. This violates data minimization principles; a more privacy-respecting approach would involve requesting only YouTube-specific credentials or limiting cookie access to YouTube domains.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill description explicitly states that it uses Firefox cookies to handle age-restricted or login-required videos. While accessing YouTube content may require authentication, accessing all Firefox cookies exposes sensitive data from other websites (e.g., login sessions, browsing history) that is unrelated to the specific task of extracting insights from YouTube videos. This violates data minimization principles; a more privacy-respecting approach would involve requesting only YouTube-specific credentials or limiting cookie access to YouTube domains.
